headline: Is Expand Energy Corporation (EXE) The Best Affordable Energy Stock to Buy?
summary: Expand Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:EXE) is among the 10 Best Affordable Energy Stocks to Buy. On February 23, Wells Fargo lifted the price target on Expand Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:EXE) to $123, up from $120, and reiterated an Equal Weight rating. The analyst says that the company aims for 20c/mcf realization benefit from supply deals and end-user […]
